summary: Merged stage decompilation work implementing 13 previously stubbed or partially unknown functions across 9 stage files, plus matching-driven prototype and GroundVars layout fixes. The decomp.dev bot reported matched code at 61.17% (+0.03%, +1220 bytes), with 5 newly 100% matched functions and multiple near-match improvements in stage units.

key_files.reason: Matched Corneria debug talk selector and Great Fox/collision translation sync functions.
Added weighted random selection for Great Bay/Tingle balloon color.
Initialized Mushroom Kingdom scale platforms and added their weight accumulation collision callback.
Set up 51 Mushroom Kingdom II brick blocks via joint lookup and grMaterial item creation.
Added stage-element/barrel-cannon position lookup from JObj transforms.
Added Mute City shadow-visibility bounds and slope test for racer platform joints.
Added Dream Land N64 stage GObj setup and wind-zone velocity callback.
Added recursive DObj TEV material recompilation and fixed callsites to pass the DObj.
Added Fountain of Dreams reflection platform initialization and dynamic light-list append.
Retyped and expanded GroundVars fields needed by the matched stage functions.
Replaced several UNK_RET/UNK_PARAMS declarations with typed prototypes.

what_changed: Implemented `grCorneria_801E0E40(void)`, a debug-only Corneria talk-number selector gated by camera pause/debug state, player 2 L/R triggers, `Ground_801C2BA4(0xC)`, `OSReport`, and an assert before calling `grCorneria_801E0F34`.
Implemented `grCorneria_801E1878(Ground_GObj*)`, copying a Great Fox JObj translation to `gr->gv.corneria.x128->hsd_obj` and then calling `Ground_801C39C0` and `Ground_801C3BB4`.
Implemented `grGreatBay_801F62F8(s32)`, selecting a weighted random result from `grGb_804D69E0.x0` entries 56-59 with retry logic to avoid returning the current value.

Implemented `grInishie1_801FC018(HSD_GObj*)`, initializing scale-platform state, caching JObjs from `Ground_801C3FA4`, storing child JObj pointers, and registering `fn_801FC9AC` with `mpJointSetCb1` for joints 0x14 and 0x15.
Implemented `fn_801FC9AC`, accumulating per-side platform weight/counts into `gr->gv.inishie1` fields and applying the `grI1_804D69F8->unk2C[1].z` multiplier for one ground enum case.

Implemented `grKinokoRoute_80208564(HSD_GObj*)`, looping over a local `s16 depths[]` list from 1 through 51 and creating/configuring destructible brick material items with `grMaterial_801C8CFC`, `grMaterial_801C8DE0`, `grMaterial_801C8E08`, and `grMaterial_801C8E68`.

Implemented `grKongo_801D7E78(HSD_GObj*, Vec3*)`, returning a position pointer after resolving either a child joint world position via `lb_8000B1CC` for several map IDs or the root JObj translation for `YORSTER`; returns NULL for unsupported or missing data.

Implemented `grMuteCity_801F2C10(Vec3*, int, HSD_JObj*)`, checking whether a JObj is one of five tracked Mute City racer-platform joints and suppressing rendering when the position is outside X bounds or below the computed platform slope.
Implemented `grOldPupupu_802108B4(int)`, fetching a stage GObj by ID and applying `Ground_SetupStageCallbacks`, with `OSReport` fallback if the GObj is missing.

Implemented `fn_802112F4(Ground_GObj*, HSD_GObj*, Vec3*)`, reading fighter position with `ftLib_80086644`, checking Dream Land wind-zone rectangles, and setting horizontal wind velocity based on `gp->gv.unk.xDC`.

Implemented `grPura_80213128(HSD_DObj*)`, traversing DObj sibling chains and recursively compiling TEV material settings with `HSD_MObjCompileTev`; updated `grPura_80213250` callsites to pass the current `dobj`.

Implemented `grShrineRoute_80209AF0(Ground_GObj*)`, clearing callbacks, setting ground flags, applying material setup, caching joint 10, initializing reflection state, and randomizing small positive/negative rotation speeds using `HSD_Randf` and `HSD_Randi`.
Implemented `grShrineRoute_8020AC44(HSD_GObj*)`, appending a new `HSD_LObj` loaded from `grSh_Route_803E5D90` to an existing light list and setting its position from `grSh_Route_803B8378`.
Updated headers for typed prototypes including `grCorneria_801E0E40`, `grGreatBay_801F62F8`, `grKinokoRoute_80208564`, `fn_802112F4`, `grPura_80213128`, and `grShrineRoute_8020A8A4`.

Updated `types.h`: changed `GroundVars_unk.xDC` from `float` to `int`, retyped `grInishie1_GroundVars.x100/x104` as `HSD_JObj*`, expanded `grMuteCity_GroundVars` with float bounds and five `HSD_JObj*` fields, and added `grShrineroute_GroundVars3` to the `Ground` union.
smart_moves: The PR did not only drop function bodies; it also fixed headers and `types.h` layouts so the new code could express real pointer/field accesses instead of relying on `UNK_PARAMS` or incorrect scalar fields.

Stage behavior was reconstructed through existing engine helpers (`Ground_801C3FA4`, `Ground_GetStageGObj`, `Ground_SetupStageCallbacks`, `mpJointSetCb1`, `grMaterial_*`, `HSD_JObj*`, `HSD_LObj*`) rather than duplicating lower-level logic.

Several functions preserve matching-shaped control flow: `goto done` in `grGreatBay_801F62F8` and `grKongo_801D7E78`, explicit early NULL returns, retry-loop bounds, and redundant-looking traversal/null checks.
The Mute City match motivated a concrete `grMuteCity_GroundVars` layout with named padding and exact offsets for X/Y slope bounds and platform JObj pointers.

The Mushroom Kingdom scale-platform functions show a useful pattern: initialize cached JObj/child pointers first, then register collision callbacks that update state through the same `Ground*` object.
The PR used `PAD_STACK` macros in multiple functions to keep stack layout compatible with the target assembly.
decomp_lessons: For stage decomp, matching a function often requires first correcting the per-stage `GroundVars` union member layout; wrong field types can block otherwise straightforward code.
Replace `UNK_RET` and `UNK_PARAMS` as soon as callsites and behavior provide evidence; typed prototypes improve both matching and future decomp readability.
Do not simplify odd-looking loops, null checks, local arrays, or `goto` exits when chasing a match; these can be required to reproduce compiler output.
Local literal arrays, such as the 1-through-51 `s16 depths[]` list in `grKinokoRoute_80208564`, can be intentional rodata/stack-shaping tactics.
Callback signatures may need explicit casts at registration sites while the actual callback body keeps its known semantic signature.
For random-selection logic, preserve the exact data index order, fallback behavior when total weight is zero, retry guard, and assert path.
Material and display-object traversal code may intentionally repeat `HSD_MObjCompileTev` calls on sibling chains; matching should take priority over deduplicating traversal.
naming_conventions: Unresolved functions kept address-based project names such as `grCorneria_801E0E40`, `grGreatBay_801F62F8`, and `fn_801FC9AC` even when the behavior is now understood.
Stage functions follow the existing stage prefix convention: `grCorneria`, `grGreatBay`, `grInishie1`, `grKinokoRoute`, `grKongo`, `grMuteCity`, `grOldPupupu`, `grPura`, and `grShrineRoute`.
Per-stage GroundVars fields remain offset-style names (`xC4`, `xD0`, `xFC`, `x100`, etc.) until stronger semantic names are available.

Common local variable names follow project style: `gobj` for `HSD_GObj*`, `jobj` for `HSD_JObj*`, `lobj` for `HSD_LObj*`, `dobj` for `HSD_DObj*`, `gp`/`gr` for `Ground*`, and `pos`/`vel` for `Vec3` values.
New struct naming stayed consistent with existing variants by adding `struct grShrineroute_GroundVars3` and union member `shrineroute3`.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: `PAD_STACK(8)`, `PAD_STACK(16)`, and `PAD_STACK(20)` were used to reproduce stack frame details.
Exact field retyping and padding in `types.h` supported matching loads/stores at the right offsets.
`grGreatBay_801F62F8` used a `do`/`while (i++ <= 1000)` retry loop and `goto done` instead of a simplified return structure.
`grKongo_801D7E78` used nested map-ID checks, early NULL returns, `goto done`, and a final `return pos` shape.
`grKinokoRoute_80208564` used a local `s16 depths[]` array and loop bound `0x33U` to drive JObj lookup order.
`grShrineRoute_80209AF0` preserved exact float constants such as `0.00006981317F` and `0.000017453292F` for randomized oscillation speeds.
`grShrineRoute_8020AC44` preserved a nullable light-list traversal expression before appending a loaded light descriptor.
Function pointer casts were used for `grMaterial_801C8CFC` and `mpJointSetCb1` callback registration to satisfy C typing while preserving call behavior.
review_feedback: No human review comments or reviews were present in the provided slice.
The only recorded feedback was the decomp.dev bot report: matched code 61.17% (+0.03%, +1220 bytes), 5 new 100% matches, and 17 improvements in unmatched items.
searchable_terms: grMuteCity_GroundVars xE4 xE8 xF0 xF4 xFC x100 x104 x108 x10C
Fountain of Dreams reflective water light
follow_up_queries: Search later PRs for final 100% fixes to `grGreatBay_801F62F8`, which the bot reported at 93.97% after this PR.
Search later PRs for final matching work on `grMuteCity_801F2C10`, `grKinokoRoute_80208564`, `grCorneria_801E1878`, `grShrineRoute_80209AF0`, `fn_802112F4`, and `grOldPupupu_802108B4`.
Look for additional semantic naming of `grMuteCity_GroundVars` fields `xE4`, `xE8`, `xF0`, `xF4`, and JObj pointers `xFC` through `x10C`.
Look for future cleanup or confirmation of `grShrineroute_GroundVars3` and the Fountain of Dreams reflection-platform fields.
Search for other stage functions that use `PAD_STACK` plus callback casts around `grMaterial_801C8CFC` or `mpJointSetCb1`.
Search for follow-up comments or reviews outside this slice if human rationale for the near-matches is needed.
